svg.aria-label: Palvento — Every channel. One clean feed.
svg.title: Palvento LinkedIn cover — editorial type
svg.desc: Cream cover for the Palvento LinkedIn Company Page. Two-line Instrument Serif italic tagline, cobalt accent on line two. 1128×191, 6:1 aspect — the exact LinkedIn Company Page cover ratio. Left ~200px intentionally kept empty to accommodate the profile logo overlay.
